title: V3Simulate generates wrong result for parameters using chain functions
body:
---


Author Name: **Ted Campbell**
Original Redmine Issue: 684 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2013-10-15
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Given the following Verilog code, we expect that LP_MAX4 should evaluate to "1".

```
// Foo.v
module Foo;

     function integer max2;
         input integer x;
         input integer y;
         begin
             max2 = ( x > y ) ? x : y;
         end
     endfunction

     function integer max4;
         input integer x;
         input integer y;
         input integer z;
         input integer w;
         begin
             max4 = max2( max2( x, y ), max2( z, w ) );
         end
     endfunction

     localparam  LP_MAX4 = max4( 1, 1, 0, 0 );

endmodule

```

Using the following verilator call ...

```verilator --cc Foo.v --debug-V3Simulate 9 --debugi-V3Const 9
```

```
- V3Simulate.h:600:      FUNCREF FUNCREF 0x15f6060 <e241#> {d21} @dt=0x15f3780@(sw32)  max4 -> FUNC 0x15f38b0 <e240#> {d11} @dt=0x15f3780@(sw32)  max4
- V3Simulate.h:188:        set num ?32?sh1 on CONST 0x15f5630 <e109> {d21} @dt=0x15f5730@(G/swu32/1)  ?32?sh1
- V3Simulate.h:178:        fetch num ?32?sh1 on CONST 0x15f5630 <e109> {d21} u3=0x15f56e0 @dt=0x15f5730@(G/swu32/1)  ?32?sh1
- V3Simulate.h:188:        set num 32'h0 on VAR 0x15f3af0 <e193#> {d12} u5=0x1 @dt=0x15f3a10@(sw32)  x [I] [FUNC] INPUT
- V3Simulate.h:188:        set num ?32?sh1 on CONST 0x15f5940 <e113> {d21} @dt=0x15f5730@(G/swu32/1)  ?32?sh1

  const_old: 2:1: CONST 0x15f5bd0 <e118> {d21} u3=0x15f5c80 @dt=0x15f5730@(G/swu32/1)  ?32?sh0
  const_old: 2: ARG 0x15f5fa0 <e124> {d21}
  const_old: 2:1: CONST 0x15f5e60 <e123> {d21} u3=0x15f5f10 @dt=0x15f5730@(G/swu32/1)  ?32?sh0
        _new:  CONST 0x15efc40 <e250#> {d21} @dt=0x15f3780@(sw32)  32'h0

```

We can see from the final line that the LP_MAX4 is incorrectly optimized to "0". If we watch the fetch calls in V3Simulate we can observe the following inconsistency.

```
- V3Simulate.h:178:        fetch num 32'h1 on COND 0x15f3570 <e229#> {d7} u3=0x15f2f90 @dt=0x15ef740@(G/sw32)
- V3Simulate.h:178:        fetch num 32'h0 on COND 0x15f3570 <e229#> {d7} u3=0x15f2f90 @dt=0x15ef740@(G/sw32)

```

This is caused by using the COND in the declaration (since this is pre-paramlink) instead of a per-instance version. This means the chained max2 function re-uses the u3 pointer and ends up with incorrect results.

This seems to be an effect of trying to call V3Const functions before functions are replicated / instantiated.

I can change my code to avoid this scenario, but I'm not sure how to fix Verilator in general.
